w:r.w:t: You wake up and check your phone. It shows the time, notifications, and even reminds you about your online class. When you search for something on the internet, results appear within seconds. All of this happens because of a

Today, computers are not limited to desktops or laptops. Mobile phones, ATMs, smart TVs, and even traffic lights work using computers. To understand advanced topics like AI, cyber safety, and office tools, we must first understand
what a computer is and how it works
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Understand how a computer works step by step
Identify the main characteristics of a computer
Explain real-life examples of computer usage
Understand the role of computers in the AI era
is an electronic device that accepts
as input, processes the data according to a set of instructions called a
as output, and stores the data or results for future use.

A computer works automatically once instructions are given. It does not have intelligence, emotions, or decision-making ability of its own. Whatever work a computer performs is based completely on the instructions provided by humans.
In modern times, computers are combined with advanced software such as
, which makes them appear intelligent. However, even AI cannot work without a computer.
Let us understand a computer using a calculator:
This shows that a calculator follows instructions exactly and does not think on its own.
🧠 Explained Example 2: Online Exam Result (Real-Life Example)
Result shown as Pass or Fail
Here, the computer converts raw data into useful information.
🔄 How Does a Computer Work? (IPO Cycle – Explained)
Input is the data or instructions given to the computer using input devices.
Processing means performing calculations or operations on the input data.
This work is done by the
Output is the final result produced after processing.
A computer can perform millions of calculations in a second, which saves time.
A computer produces accurate results if correct data and instructions are provided.
Unlike humans, a computer does not get tired and can work continuously.
Once instructions are given, a computer works automatically without further help.
A computer can store a large amount of data and retrieve it whenever required.
Computers are widely used in different fields:
🤖 Computers in the AI Era (Carefully Integrated)
In the AI era, computers perform smart tasks such as:
Despite many advantages, computers have limitations:
Cannot take decisions on their own
A computer is an electronic device
It works using the IPO cycle
Computers are fast, accurate, and reliable
AI makes computers smarter, not independent
Define a computer with an example.
Explain the IPO cycle with a diagram.
Write any four characteristics of a computer.
Write the definition of a computer.
Observe one AI feature in your daily life and write about it.
Imagine your teacher writes the following numbers on the board:
At first glance, these numbers do not tell us anything.
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Explain the difference between data and information
Understand how data is converted into information
Relate data and information to AI-based systems
that are collected but not processed.
Data by itself does not have any meaning. It is simply a collection of values, symbols, or observations.
In a computer system, data is the
A computer cannot perform any operation unless data is provided.
Data can exist in different forms:
Numbers such as marks, age, roll number
Data alone cannot help in decision-making.
so that it becomes meaningful and useful.
produced by a computer after processing the input data.
It helps users understand a situation and take decisions.
Information always has a meaning and purpose.
🖼️ Diagram: Conversion of Data into Information
🤖 Data and Information in the AI Era
Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems depend heavily on data.
AI collects large amounts of data
AI generates intelligent information such as predictions and suggestions
Better data results in better AI decisions.
AI uses data to produce intelligent information
Explain the difference between data and information with an example.
Write two examples of data and information from daily life.
Think about how many tasks a computer can perform in just a few seconds.
It can calculate marks of hundreds of students, store thousands of photos, and even help doctors analyze reports.
Humans cannot perform all these tasks so quickly and accurately.
This is because computers have certain
that make them powerful and reliable.
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Explain the main characteristics of a computer
Understand why computers are faster and more accurate than humans
Relate computer characteristics to real-life situations
Understand how these characteristics support AI-based applications
⭐ What are the Characteristics of a Computer?
are the special features or qualities that distinguish computers from humans and other machines.
Let us study these characteristics in detail.
A computer can perform millions of calculations in a second.
Tasks that may take humans hours or days can be completed by a computer in a few seconds.
Calculating results of 500 students manually may take hours
A computer can calculate results in seconds
📌 This makes computers very useful in schools, banks, and offices.
if the input data and instructions are correct.
Computers do not make mistakes on their own.
If correct marks are entered, the computer will always calculate the correct total and percentage
Errors in output are usually due to
Diligence means the ability to work continuously without getting tired or bored.
A computer can perform the same task repeatedly with the same speed and accuracy.
A computer can check attendance of students every day without any fatigue
Humans may feel tired doing repetitive tasks
Automation means that once instructions are given, a computer works automatically without human intervention.
Washing machine controlled by a computer
Automatic calculation of marks once data is entered
📌 Computers follow instructions step by step.
A computer can store a large amount of data and information.
Stored data can be accessed anytime when required.
Student records stored for many years
Photos and videos saved on a device
📌 Computers store data more efficiently than humans.
Versatility means the ability to perform different types of tasks.
Same computer can be used for:
🤖 Characteristics of Computers in the AI Era
The characteristics of computers help AI systems work efficiently:
Fast data processing for AI decisions
AI depends on the basic characteristics of computers.
Despite many strengths, computers have limitations:
Define speed and accuracy of a computer.
What is automation? Give an example.
How does storage help AI systems?
Write any four characteristics of a computer with examples.
Observe one automated system at home or school.
Lecture 4: Limitations of Computers & Human vs Computer
Computers are very fast and accurate. They can store huge amounts of data and work continuously without getting tired.
However, does this mean computers are perfect?
This lecture helps us understand the
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Understand why computers cannot replace humans
Understand the limitations of AI-based systems
Despite many advantages, computers have certain limitations.
A computer cannot think or understand on its own.
It follows instructions given by humans.
It cannot decide whether marks are fair or unfair
📌 Computers do not have natural intelligence.
Computers do not have emotions such as happiness, sadness, fear, or excitement.
A teacher can understand a student’s emotions
A computer cannot feel sympathy or care
Computers depend completely on humans for:
Without human input, a computer cannot perform any task.
If wrong data or instructions are given to a computer, the output will also be wrong.
📌 Computers cannot correct mistakes on their own.
They act according to pre-defined rules.
A computer can show exam results
It cannot decide how to motivate a weak student
🤖 Limitations of Computers in the AI Era
AI decisions are based on patterns, not emotions
AI does not remove computer limitations
Write any three limitations of computers.
Can AI replace humans? Give reason.
Write two limitations of computers with examples.
Observe one situation where a human decision is better than a computer.
Lecture 5: Components of a Computer System
🌍 Let’s Begin with a Simple Question
When you look at a computer, you usually see a
But is that all a computer consists of?
Just like the human body has different organs that work together, a computer system also has
Only when all these components work together does a computer function properly.
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Identify the main components of a computer system
Explain the role of each component
Relate computer components to AI-based systems
that work together to perform tasks and produce meaningful output.
The main components of a computer system are:
are used to enter data and instructions into a computer.
They help the computer understand what the user wants to do.
Used to type text and numbers
Used to point, click, and select
Converts paper documents into digital form
Used to capture images and videos
Typing your name using a keyboard is input.
It processes data and controls all operations of the computer.
Performs logical operations (greater than, less than)
Directs all components what to do
📌 Without CPU, a computer cannot work.
Memory and storage are used to
📌 Data stored in RAM is lost when power is off.
display the result processed by the computer.
Viewing exam results on screen is output.
All components work together to complete the task.
🖼️ Diagram: Components of a Computer System
🤖 Components of Computer System in the AI Era
AI systems need strong computer components to work efficiently.
A computer system has multiple components
CPU is the brain of the computer

A computer cannot work on its own.
Without input devices, a computer would be like a human without senses.

bridge between the user and the computer
, helping the computer understand what the user wants.
is the most commonly used input device.
It is used to enter text, numbers, and commands.
Typing your name during an online exam.
is a pointing device used to control the movement of the cursor on the screen.
Clicking on an icon to open a file.
is an input device that converts
Scanning an answer sheet for online submission.
🤖 Input Devices in the AI Era
AI systems depend heavily on advanced input devices.
Better input devices help AI systems work more accurately.
Input devices enter data into the computer
Keyboard and mouse are common input devices
Scanner, microphone, and webcam are advanced input devices
AI systems use input devices to sense the world
Explain the use of scanner and microphone.
How do input devices help AI systems?

Whenever you type something on a computer, you immediately see the result on the screen.
When you give a print command, a paper comes out of the printer.
When you play a song, you hear sound from the speakers.
All these results are produced using

Identify different types of output devices
Explain the working and uses of output devices
Understand the importance of output devices in AI systems
produced by a computer after processing input data.
They convert digital information into a form that humans can
is the most common output device.
It displays text, images, and videos on the screen.
Seeing your marks on the computer screen.
is an output device that produces output on paper.
This printed output is called a
Printing an admit card or report card.
are output devices that produce sound.
Hearing the teacher’s voice during an online class.
They allow users to listen privately.
Attending online lectures without disturbing others.
displays computer output on a large screen.
Teacher explaining topics using slides in class.
🤖 Output Devices in the AI Era
AI-based systems use output devices to show intelligent results.
Without output devices, AI results cannot be understood by humans.
Monitor and printer are common output devices
AI systems depend on output devices to communicate
Differentiate between soft copy and hard copy.
How do output devices help AI systems?

When you solve a math problem, your
Similarly, in a computer, all calculations and decisions are done by the
That is why the CPU is called the
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Identify the main parts of CPU
Understand how CPU supports AI-based systems
🧠 What is the Central Processing Unit (CPU)?
is the most important component of a computer system.
It processes data, performs calculations, and controls all operations of the computer.
Every instruction given to a computer is executed by the CPU.
Without the CPU, a computer cannot function.
The CPU performs three main functions:
The CPU consists of two major parts:
Logical operations (greater than, less than, equal to)
controls and manages all activities of the computer.
Coordinates between input, output, and memory
Sending data from keyboard to CPU
AI-based systems need powerful CPUs to:
along with CPUs to improve AI performance.
AI works efficiently only when the CPU is powerful.
CPU depends on memory and other components
CPU is the brain of the computer
CPU is essential for AI systems
Why is CPU called the brain of the computer?
🌍 Let’s Start with a Real-Life Example
Imagine you are solving a math problem.
to store the answer for later.
Understanding memory and storage helps us know
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Understand the importance of memory in AI systems
is the part of a computer that stores
temporarily while the computer is working.
Memory helps the CPU perform tasks quickly.
used to store data that is currently being processed.
Data in RAM is lost when power is switched off
Files opened while working on a computer.
that stores important instructions needed to start the computer.
Data in ROM is not lost when power is off
Instructions used when the computer boots.
are used to store data and information
They store data even when the computer is switched off.
Used for storing media and software
🤖 Memory and Storage in the AI Era
Better memory and storage improve AI performance.
RAM and ROM are primary memory
AI systems depend on large memory and storage
How does memory help AI systems?
Write differences between memory and storage
A computer without software is like a body without instructions.
Even the most powerful computer cannot work unless software tells it
Software makes computers useful and helps us perform different tasks easily.
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Explain system software and application software
Understand how AI-based software works on computers
is a set of instructions or programs that tell the computer
Software controls the hardware and makes it work according to the user’s needs.
Software is mainly divided into two types:
controls and manages the computer hardware.
It provides a platform for application software to run.
The operating system helps you open files and run applications.
Using MS Word to write an assignment.
🤖 Application Software in the AI Era
AI-based software still needs system software and hardware to run.
⚠️ Difference Between System Software and Application Software
Application software helps users perform tasks
Differentiate between system software and application software.
Give two examples of application software.
List system and application software used at home
Imagine a classroom without a teacher.
Students, books, and boards are present, but no one is managing them.
The operating system acts as the
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Explain the functions of an operating system
Understand the role of operating systems in AI-based applications
that controls and manages all the hardware and software resources of a computer.
interface between the user and the computer hardware
📌 Without an operating system, a computer cannot start or function.
The operating system performs many important functions:
The OS starts the computer when power is turned on
Windows loading screen when computer starts.
Running a browser and a document at the same time.
Decides which task gets CPU time
Listening to music while typing notes.
Allows users to create, delete, and move files
Uses device drivers to communicate with hardware
📌 Different devices use different operating systems.
🤖 Operating System in the AI Era
AI-based applications depend heavily on the operating system:
OS manages CPU, memory, and storage for AI programs
OS allows AI software to interact with hardware
OS ensures smooth multitasking for AI applications
AI-based face recognition accessing camera through OS
Acts as an interface between user and hardware
AI applications depend on OS support
List any four functions of an OS.
How does OS support AI applications?
Write functions of an operating system
When you send a message on WhatsApp or attend an online class, your computer or mobile is
This connection allows information to travel from one place to another within seconds.
This connection between computers is called a
After completing this lecture, you will be able to:
Understand the need for computer networks
Understand how AI works using the internet
is a group of two or more computers connected together to
Networks allow computers to communicate with each other easily and quickly.
🤔 Why Do We Need Computer Networks?
Computer networks are useful because they:
One printer used by many computers in a school lab.
Bluetooth connection between mobile and earphones
Covers a small area like a school or office
Computer lab network in a school
Covers a city or large area
is a global network that connects millions of computers all over the world.
AI systems depend on the internet for:
Without the internet, many AI services cannot work.
AI tools depend on networks and internet
Name any four types of networks.
How does the internet support AI applications?
Write examples of PAN, LAN, MAN, WAN

cyber safety, office tools, and AI-based applications
